assertions.assertion: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertions.evidence: Lines 1-4 contain valid YAML frontmatter with name: nextjs-cdk-deploy and description field

assertions.assertion: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning Next.js and deployment
assertions.evidence: The frontmatter description field does not contain 'Use when' trigger language. It reads 'Deploy Next.js applications to AWS using CDK...' which describes the skill but lacks explicit 'Use when' trigger conditions. The body has a 'When to Use' section but the description field itself lacks this pattern.

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body contains a multi-step numbered deployment workflow
assertions.evidence: Steps 1-8 are clearly numbered: Validate Prerequisites, Configure Environments, Build, Synthesize, Deploy to Staging, Manual Approval Gate, Deploy to Production, Rollback

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body mentions staging and production environments
assertions.evidence: Both 'staging' and 'production' are mentioned extensively throughout the document including dedicated config files, deployment steps, and environment-specific settings

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body includes rollback procedures with specific steps
assertions.evidence: Step 8 (lines 281-306) provides detailed rollback procedures with 5 numbered steps and a table of rollback strategies by failure type (Lambda error, infrastructure, config, database, CDN)

assertions.assertion: A scripts/ directory exists with at least 2 deployment-related scripts
assertions.evidence: scripts/ directory contains 7 deployment-related scripts: approve.ts, build.ts, deploy.ts, history.ts, rollback.ts, smoke-test.ts, synth.ts

assertions.assertion: The scripts use Bun TypeScript (.ts files) as the preferred runtime
assertions.evidence: All 7 scripts are .ts files and the SKILL.md references them with 'bun run scripts/...' commands throughout

assertions.assertion: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertions.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases: eval-initial-setup (8 assertions), eval-deploy-pipeline (8 assertions), eval-rollback-scenario (8 assertions)

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertions.evidence: Line 418: '## Common Mistakes' section with a 10-row table covering mistakes like missing standalone output, skipping staging, hardcoding env vars, etc.

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
assertions.evidence: File is 477 lines total, under the 500-line limit
